'''''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 15''' is the fifteenth issue of [[Star Wars Insider|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'']], later rebranded as the ''Star Wars Insider''. Issue 15 was published in Winter [[1992]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
===Features===
*"''The Young Indiana Jones Chronicles'': Fan Club Exclusive"
*"''Defenders of Dynatron City'': Sneak Preview" by [[John S. Davis]]
*"Learning with [[Lucasfilm]]" by [[Adam Schultz]]
*"The [[Industrial Light & Magic|ILM]] FX Team"
*"Inside Lucasfilm Games" by John S. Davis and [[Mark Streed]]
*"Who's Scruffy Looking?" cartoon by [[Lisa E. Cowan]] and [[R. Tomasic]]
